raw_text: Mattermost versions 11.3.x < = 11.3.0, 11.2.x < = 11.2.2, 10.11.x < = 10.11.10 fail to properly validate team membership when searching channels which allows a removed team member to enumerate all public channels within a private team via the channel search API endpoint.. Mattermost Advisory ID: MMSA-2025-00568
